summary: Pipeline Health State Feature - All 57 backend tests PASSED (100%). The new pipeline_health_state field is correctly implemented in program_metrics API with values: strong_momentum, active, needs_follow_up, cooling_off, at_risk.

VERIFIED: Stanford program (0 meaningful interactions, never) returns cooling_off
VERIFIED: UCLA program (1 meaningful, 12 days ago, accelerating) returns active

CODE REVIEW: _compute_pipeline_health() uses scoring system: recency (+3 to -3), trend (+2 to -2), depth (+2 to -1), overdue (-2), unanswered questions (-2), velocity (+1 to -1). Thresholds: >=5 strong_momentum, >=2 active, >=0 needs_follow_up, >=-3 cooling_off, else at_risk

success_rate.backend: 100% (57/57 tests passed - 22 base + 16 meaningful engagement + 19 pipeline health)
